Meaning.Vi: lợi thế; lợi ích; ưu thế
Meaning.En: A condition or circumstance that puts one in a favorable position relative to others.
Meaning.Example: Her extensive experience gave her a clear advantage in the job interview.

Situation.Vi: So sánh giữa hai đối thủ trong thi đấu hoặc cạnh tranh.
Situation.En: Comparison between two competitors in sports or business.

Situation.Vi: Tận dụng điểm mạnh để đạt kết quả tốt hơn.
Situation.En: Leveraging a strength to achieve better results.

Meaning.En: A gain or profit, especially in financial or commercial contexts.
Meaning.Example: The new policy is expected to provide a significant advantage to small businesses.

Situation.Vi: Doanh nghiệp có lợi thế cạnh tranh nhờ giá thấp.
Situation.En: A business gains competitive advantage through lower pricing.
